rationale: The "fail at a bus puzzle" hook is a draw-puzzle/parking trope that has zero mechanical overlap with Knock'em All's tap-to-shoot physics loop — players clicking the ad expecting vehicle steering will bounce hard, hurting CVR and D1. Visual palette (white/green/red) is partially compatible with the game's bright flat aesthetic, but the bus/cursor staging misrepresents the FPS dummy-shooting gameplay. Only the broad casual "fail bait" audience overlaps; recommend skipping this archetype and instead testing fail-bait framed around missed shots or dummies surviving on the platform.
